# Asana

> AI Registry entry [AIR-35](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-35/asana) — status **Production** as of 2026-04-06. Departments: —.

**Category:** Project Management / Work Management
**Cost per User/Month:** Free (Basic); $10.99 (Premium); $24.99 (Business)
**Departments:** Country (Company-in-a-Box)

## Overview

Widely used work management platform. At Janus, Asana is used specifically for the Company-in-a-Box project — playbook and checklist system for setting up new offices across jurisdictions. NOT used company-wide; [[linear|Linear]] serves the AI Office, and [[clickup|ClickUp]] ([[clickup|AIR-44]]) under evaluation for broader use.

## Capabilities

* Task management with dependencies, custom fields
* Project views: List, Board, Timeline, Calendar, Workload
* Templates — reusable project templates (critical for Company-in-a-Box replication)
* Custom fields, Goals, reporting, Forms
* Automation rules
* Portfolios for leadership view

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR
* SSO/SAML on Business and Enterprise
* Data encryption (AES-256)
* EU data residency option

## Relevance to Janus Digital

Manages the 400+ item Company-in-a-Box checklist for new office setup across jurisdictions (Singapore, future expansions). Per 2026-04-06 CEO call, Asana management is being transferred to IT department as it falls outside AI Office scope.

*Deployed for Country/Operations project management. Functional tier. Ownership transferring to IT department.*
